questions.target_text: He must have forgotten the meeting.
questions.hint_uk: Must have + V3 = сильний висновок про минуле.
questions.question: Він, мабуть, забув про зустріч.

questions.target_text: She must have read the message already.
questions.hint_uk: Read is V3 here after must have.
questions.question: Вона, мабуть, уже прочитала повідомлення.

questions.target_text: They must have missed the train.
questions.hint_uk: Must have missed shows a confident deduction.
questions.question: Вони, мабуть, пропустили поїзд.

questions.target_text: We must have left the keys at home.
questions.hint_uk: Left is V3 after must have.
questions.question: Ми, мабуть, залишили ключі вдома.

questions.target_text: He must have misunderstood the instructions.
questions.hint_uk: Use V3 after modal + have.
questions.question: Він, мабуть, неправильно зрозумів інструкції.

questions.target_text: The rain must have started during the night.
questions.hint_uk: Must have started = deduction about past event.
questions.question: Дощ, мабуть, почався вночі.

questions.source_text_uk: Вона не могла бачити твоє повідомлення.
questions.target_text: She cannot have seen your message.
questions.hint_uk: Cannot have + V3 = past event is logically impossible.
questions.question: Вона не могла бачити твоє повідомлення.

questions.source_text_uk: Вони не могли завершити звіт так швидко.
questions.target_text: They cannot have finished the report so quickly.
questions.hint_uk: Cannot have finished rejects a past possibility.
questions.question: Вони не могли завершити звіт так швидко.

questions.source_text_uk: Він не міг узяти твою сумку випадково.
questions.target_text: He cannot have taken your bag by mistake.
questions.hint_uk: Taken is V3 after cannot have.
questions.question: Він не міг узяти твою сумку випадково.

questions.source_text_uk: Ми не могли пропустити той знак.
questions.target_text: We cannot have missed that sign.
questions.hint_uk: Cannot have missed is a strong negative deduction.
questions.question: Ми не могли пропустити той знак.

questions.target_text: She cannot have known the answer.
questions.hint_uk: Known is V3 after cannot have.
questions.question: Вона не могла знати відповідь.

questions.source_text_uk: Вони не могли піти раніше за нас.
questions.target_text: They cannot have left before us.
questions.hint_uk: Cannot have left expresses impossible past deduction.
questions.question: Вони не могли піти раніше за нас.

questions.target_text: He may have chosen the wrong file.
questions.hint_uk: May have + V3 = possible past event.
questions.question: Він, можливо, вибрав неправильний файл.

questions.target_text: She might have taken the early train.
questions.hint_uk: Might have taken shows uncertainty about the past.
questions.question: Вона, можливо, взяла ранній поїзд.

questions.target_text: They could have forgotten the address.
questions.hint_uk: Could have forgotten means it was possible.
questions.question: Вони, можливо, забули адресу.

questions.target_text: We may have met before.
questions.hint_uk: Met is V3 after may have.
questions.question: Ми, можливо, зустрічалися раніше.

questions.target_text: He might not have received the invitation.
questions.hint_uk: Might not have + V3 keeps uncertainty negative.
questions.question: Він, можливо, не отримав запрошення.

questions.source_text_uk: Вона, можливо, залишила ноутбук в офісі.
questions.target_text: She could have left the laptop at the office.
questions.hint_uk: Could have left is a possible past explanation.
questions.question: Вона, можливо, залишила ноутбук в офісі.

questions.target_text: They may not have understood the question.
questions.hint_uk: May not have understood = possible negative past.
questions.question: Вони, можливо, не зрозуміли питання.

questions.source_text_uk: Я, можливо, натиснув не ту кнопку.
questions.target_text: I might have pressed the wrong button.
questions.hint_uk: Might have pressed uses V3.
questions.question: Я, можливо, натиснув не ту кнопку.

questions.target_text: We could have chosen the longer route.
questions.hint_uk: Chosen is V3 after could have.
questions.question: Ми, можливо, обрали довший маршрут.

questions.target_text: She may not have seen the update.
questions.hint_uk: May not have seen expresses uncertainty.
questions.question: Вона, можливо, не бачила оновлення.

questions.target_text: He might have left the door open.
questions.hint_uk: Might have left = possible past action.
questions.question: Він, можливо, залишив двері відчиненими.

questions.target_text: They could have mixed up the date.
questions.hint_uk: Could have mixed up uses V3 phrase.
questions.question: Вони, можливо, переплутали дату.

questions.source_text_uk: Мені слід було подзвонити тобі раніше.
questions.target_text: I should have called you earlier.
questions.hint_uk: Should have + V3 expresses regret.
questions.question: Мені слід було подзвонити тобі раніше.

questions.target_text: She should have checked the address.
questions.hint_uk: Should have checked = better past action.
questions.question: Їй слід було перевірити адресу.

questions.source_text_uk: Нам слід було забронювати квитки раніше.
questions.target_text: We should have booked the tickets earlier.
questions.hint_uk: Should have booked criticizes a past choice.
questions.question: Нам слід було забронювати квитки раніше.

questions.target_text: He should have listened more carefully.
questions.hint_uk: Listened is V3 after should have.
questions.question: Йому слід було уважніше слухати.

questions.source_text_uk: Вони не мали витрачати стільки грошей.
questions.target_text: They should not have spent so much money.
questions.hint_uk: Should not have + V3 criticizes a past action.
questions.question: Вони не мали витрачати стільки грошей.

questions.source_text_uk: Тобі не слід було казати це на зустрічі.
questions.target_text: You should not have said that at the meeting.
questions.hint_uk: Said is V3 after should not have.
questions.question: Тобі не слід було казати це на зустрічі.

questions.source_text_uk: Мені не слід було відкривати той файл.
questions.target_text: I should not have opened that file.
questions.hint_uk: Should not have opened = past regret.
questions.question: Мені не слід було відкривати той файл.

questions.source_text_uk: Їй не слід було ігнорувати попередження.
questions.target_text: She should not have ignored the warning.
questions.hint_uk: Should not have ignored criticizes a past decision.
questions.question: Їй не слід було ігнорувати попередження.

questions.target_text: We should have started earlier.
questions.hint_uk: Should have started earlier expresses regret.
questions.question: Нам слід було почати раніше.

questions.target_text: He should not have blamed the team.
questions.hint_uk: Should not have blamed = criticism.
questions.question: Він не мав звинувачувати команду.

questions.target_text: You should have saved a copy.
questions.hint_uk: Should have saved = recommended past action.
questions.question: Тобі слід було зберегти копію.

questions.source_text_uk: Вони не мали підписувати договір так швидко.
questions.target_text: They should not have signed the contract so quickly.
questions.hint_uk: Should not have signed criticizes speed of action.
questions.question: Вони не мали підписувати договір так швидко.

questions.target_text: Could he have misunderstood the instructions?
questions.hint_uk: Question: Could + subject + have + V3?
questions.question: Він міг неправильно зрозуміти інструкції?

questions.target_text: Might she have missed the message?
questions.hint_uk: Might she have missed...? asks about a possible past event.
questions.question: Вона могла пропустити повідомлення?

questions.target_text: Must they have forgotten the meeting?
questions.hint_uk: Must they have...? asks about deduction.
questions.question: Вони, мабуть, забули зустріч?

questions.source_text_uk: Нам слід було подзвонити клієнту раніше?
questions.target_text: Should we have called the client earlier?
questions.hint_uk: Should we have called...? asks about regret.
questions.question: Нам слід було подзвонити клієнту раніше?

questions.target_text: What might they have forgotten?
questions.hint_uk: Wh-question with might have + V3.
questions.question: Що вони могли забути?

questions.target_text: Where could she have put the keys?
questions.hint_uk: Where could she have put...? uses V3 put.
questions.question: Куди вона могла покласти ключі?

questions.target_text: Why should he have apologized earlier?
questions.hint_uk: Why should he have apologized...? asks about regret.
questions.question: Чому він мав вибачитися раніше?

questions.target_text: Who could have sent this email?
questions.hint_uk: Who could have sent...? uses V3 sent.
questions.question: Хто міг відправити цей лист?

questions.target_text: How could they have lost the documents?
questions.hint_uk: How could they have lost...? asks about possible past event.
questions.question: Як вони могли загубити документи?

questions.source_text_uk: Чому вона не могла бачити знак?
questions.target_text: Why cannot she have seen the sign?
questions.hint_uk: Cannot have seen remains uncontracted.
questions.question: Чому вона не могла бачити знак?

questions.target_text: What should we have done differently?
questions.hint_uk: Should have done expresses regret.
questions.question: Що ми мали зробити інакше?

questions.source_text_uk: Кого вони могли запросити замість нього?
questions.target_text: Who might they have invited instead of him?
questions.hint_uk: Who might they have invited...? uses V3 invited.
questions.question: Кого вони могли запросити замість нього?

saved_test.name: Polyglot: modal perfect deduction and regret (B2)
